title: Chicken and American Skillet Delight
description: A classic American dish featuring poached chicken, cooked in a delicate skillet with a touch of American flavor.
instructions: Season the chicken breast with salt and pepper.
Heat the butter in the delicate skillet over medium heat.
Add the chicken breast to the skillet and cook until browned on both sides.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the American cheese to the skillet and let it melt.
Return the chicken to the skillet and pour the melted cheese over it.
Sprinkle the garlic powder over the top of the chicken.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the cheese is bubbly and the chicken is cooked through.
